evidence: The May 18 17:30 PT to May 19 05:30 PT audit found reliable scheduling but 53 of 54 blocked or partially useful runs.
Repeated blockers were read/write policy limits, apply-patch failures, $CODEX_HOME access limits, Node/npm execution limits, and commit/push closeout failures.
One Senior run landed protected evidence access commit 2b552bc, proving the QoL ladder can produce durable work when writable execution is available.
The live/local Senior Capstone QoL registry now has 10 ACTIVE Slot 1 automations and 20 PAUSED Slot 2/3 reserve automations.

automation_efficiency.notes: Burn-down mode keeps one active daily pass per QoL target and pauses duplicate Slot 2/3 starts until writable execution and accepted-pass conversion recover.
